top_stories.title: VU#780781: Casdoor contains multiple authentication bypass and access management vulnerabilities
top_stories.summary: Casdoor versions 2.362.0 and earlier contain multiple vulnerabilities enabling authentication bypass and privilege escalation, as disclosed in vulnerability advisory VU#780781. The flaws are specifically tied to SAML processing within the open-source identity and access management platform.

top_stories.title: Ping Identity redefines the identity control plane for the agentic enterprise
top_stories.summary: Ping Identity announced new platform capabilities designed to extend its identity platform for agentic enterprise use cases, where AI agents, builders, and automation participate in business processes. The update focuses on redefining the identity control plane to accommodate non-human identities and AI-driven workflows.

top_stories.title: With Complex Cloud Integrations, Small Errors Lead to Major Compromises
top_stories.summary: Researchers discovered an exploit chain in a popular automation service that combined over-permissioned roles, secrets discovery, and non-human identities to achieve a major compromise. The attack vector highlights risks associated with excessive IAM permissions and non-human identity (NHI) management in complex cloud integrations.

top_stories.title: Google Chrome adds session cookie theft protection for all users
top_stories.summary: Google has made Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) generally available in Chrome, rolling it out to all users. DBSC binds session cookies to a specific device to prevent cookie theft and account takeover attacks.

top_stories.title: Hackers exploit FortiClient EMS flaw to push infostealer malware
top_stories.summary: Hackers are actively exploiting an authentication bypass vulnerability (CVE-2026-35616) in Fortinet's FortiClient Enterprise Management Server (EMS) to deliver a credential-stealing malware called EKZ. The attack leverages the authentication bypass flaw to gain access and deploy an undocumented infostealer targeting credentials stored on compromised systems.

news.title: New infostealer reaches enterprise devices through FortiClient EMS vulnerability
news.summary: Attackers are exploiting CVE-2026-35616, an improper access control vulnerability in Fortinet's FortiClient Enterprise Management Server (EMS), to deliver an infostealer malware to enterprise endpoints. The malicious payload was disguised as a Fortinet endpoint update and executed through FortiClient-managed VPN scripting workflows, according to Arctic Wolf researchers.

news.title: Humanix expands detection to identify live violations of security procedures
news.summary: Humanix has announced a new capability to detect live violations of security procedures governing IT help desk and service desk workflows in real time. The feature focuses on preventing unauthorized access by ensuring agents follow identity verification steps before fulfilling sensitive requests such as credential resets, addressing social engineering attacks that exploit help desk processes.

news.title: SailPoint、Claude Compliance APIとの統合を発表、AIプラットフォーム向けにエンタープライズ グレードのアイデンティティ セキュリティを提供
news.summary: SailPoint announced an integration with Anthropic's Claude Compliance API to deliver enterprise-grade identity security for AI platforms. The press release is a Japanese-language translation of the original announcement made in the US on May 21, 2026.

news.title: What did Okta report about agentic AI demand? #tech
news.summary: Okta reported Q1 revenue of $765M, up 11% year over year, beating analyst expectations of $752M. The company cited agentic AI as a driver of increased demand for identity tools.

news.title: Threat Actors Exploit Critical FortiClient EMS Flaw to Deploy Credential Stealer
news.summary: Threat actors are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability in Fortinet's FortiClient Endpoint Management Server (EMS) to deploy credential-stealing malware across managed endpoints. The attackers disguised the credential stealer payload as a legitimate Fortinet endpoint component, abusing trusted endpoint management infrastructure to propagate the malware.

news.title: Microsoft Slams Public Zero-Day Disclosures Amid GitHub Researcher Account Removal
news.summary: Microsoft publicly defended Coordinated Vulnerability Disclosure (CVD) after removing a researcher's GitHub account following public disclosure of multiple zero-days. The incident involves a researcher known as Chaotic Eclipse/Nightmare-Eclipse who disclosed vulnerabilities without prior vendor coordination, prompting Microsoft's response on responsible disclosure practices.

news.title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: Claude Security Plugin, Azure Priv-Esc, Kali365 MFA Bypass, FIFA Scams +15 More
news.summary: A threat intelligence bulletin covers multiple security topics including an Azure privilege escalation vulnerability and an MFA bypass technique called Kali365. The roundup also touches on Claude security plugins and various social engineering threats across approximately 15+ items.

news.title: Okta tops estimates and raises outlook as SentinelOne slides on weak guidance
news.summary: Okta reported quarterly earnings that beat analyst estimates, with shares rising more than 6% in after-hours trading. The company also raised its forward outlook following the results.

news.title: Transforming our approach to sensitivity labels at Microsoft with Microsoft Entra - Inside Track Blog
news.summary: Microsoft has extended sensitivity labels to Microsoft Entra security groups using labels policy to control oversharing and enable secure self-service. The implementation represents an internal use case of Microsoft Entra for managing group-based access and data classification within Microsoft's own environment.

news.title: Okta tops first-quarter results on agentic AI demand
news.summary: Okta reported first-quarter financial results that exceeded expectations, driven by demand for agentic AI capabilities. CEO Todd McKinnon indicated the company is increasing resource allocation toward agentic AI tools as part of its long-term strategy.

news.title: Orchid Security targets AI agent sprawl with new identity governance tools
news.summary: Orchid Security has extended its Identity Control Plane platform with new tools specifically designed to govern AI agents, addressing gaps in existing IAM models. The company argues that current identity and access management frameworks cannot adequately handle AI agents that inherit authority from both humans and machines.

news.title: Gartner® Names Keeper Security the Second Fastest-Growing Company in the Market Share Analysis: Security Software, Worldwide, 2025
news.summary: Gartner has named Keeper Security the second fastest-growing company in its Market Share Analysis: Security Software, Worldwide, 2025 report. The recognition highlights Keeper Security's PAM platform, KeeperPAM, along with KeeperAI and Keeper Forcefield products.

news.title: Microsoft’s new cloud PCs place AI agents under enterprise controls
news.summary: Microsoft announced Windows 365 for Agents, a cloud PC platform designed to run AI agents within secure, enterprise-controlled environments. The platform allows organizations to manage and direct AI agents interacting with enterprise systems, placing agentic workloads under existing enterprise access controls and governance frameworks.

news.title: Gartner(R)、Keeper Securityを全世界セキュリティソフトウェア市場の急成長企業第2位にランクイン
news.summary: Gartner ranked Keeper Security as the second fastest-growing company in the global security software market. Keeper Security is a PAM and password management vendor operating in the IAM space.

news.title: Bosses blinded by confidence about shadow AI use by workers
news.summary: An Okta survey found that more than half of organizations experienced an AI-related security incident or near miss in the past year. The report highlights a disconnect between employer confidence and actual employee shadow AI usage within organizations.

news.title: Ping Identity advances agentic security with AI governance and trusted access
news.summary: Ping Identity announced new platform capabilities focused on agentic AI security, extending its platform to manage and govern access for AI agents, automation systems, and developers. The updates address how AI agents interact with identity and access management controls across enterprise environments.

news.title: XM Cyber rolls out tools to identify and revoke unused permissions across hybrid environments
news.summary: XM Cyber has expanded its platform with new capabilities focused on enforcing least-privilege access across Active Directory, Microsoft Entra, and multicloud environments. The new tools are designed to identify and revoke unused permissions in hybrid environments as part of continuous exposure management.

news.title: When your biggest security risk has never signed a contract
news.summary: Computer Weekly's Security Think Tank examines how AI agents are expanding the boundaries of identity and access management in the agentic era. The article explores new governance approaches required to manage non-human identities that operate autonomously without traditional contractual or organizational relationships.

news.title: MFA Prompt Bombing: Why Your Second Factor Isn't Saving You
news.summary: The article examines MFA prompt bombing attacks, where attackers bypass multi-factor authentication by repeatedly sending approval requests until users inadvertently accept them. The piece addresses why traditional MFA implementations fail against this technique and targets IAM and security professionals responsible for authentication strategy.

news.title: Understanding acceptMappedClaims in Microsoft Entra ID Claims Mapping Policies
news.summary: The article explains the `acceptMappedClaims` property in Microsoft Entra ID claims mapping policies and how it resolves the AADSTS50146 authentication error. It covers configuration steps for enabling custom claims in Entra ID application authentication flows.

news.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
news.summary: A CISA contractor intentionally published AWS GovCloud keys and other agency secrets to a public GitHub account, resulting in a significant credential leak. Lawmakers from both congressional chambers are demanding answers while CISA works to contain the breach and invalidate the compromised credentials.

news.title: AI Agents Are Shifting Identity Security Budget Dynamics
news.summary: New Omdia research examines how AI agent identity management is creating distinct budget dynamics compared to traditional IAM projects. The research highlights the growing need to manage, secure, and govern AI agent identities as these projects proliferate across enterprises.

news.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
news.summary: A CISA contractor exposed highly privileged AWS GovCloud account credentials and internal system details in a public GitHub repository until this past weekend. The leaked files included information about how CISA builds, tests, and deploys software internally, with security experts describing it as one of the most serious government data leaks in recent history.

news.title: ‘Scattered Spider’ Member ‘Tylerb’ Pleads Guilty
news.summary: Tyler Robert Buchanan, a 24-year-old British national and senior member of the Scattered Spider cybercrime group, pleaded guilty to wire fraud conspiracy and aggravated identity theft. The group conducted SMS phishing attacks in 2022 that compromised at least a dozen major technology companies and stole tens of millions of dollars in cryptocurrency, with Scattered Spider previously linked to high-profile breaches exploiting identity and authentication weaknesses at organizations including MGM and Caesars.

news.title: Russia Hacked Routers to Steal Microsoft Office Tokens
news.summary: Russian military intelligence hackers are exploiting vulnerabilities in older routers to harvest Microsoft Office authentication tokens from users across more than 18,000 networks. The campaign operates without deploying malware, instead silently siphoning authentication tokens to gain unauthorized access to Microsoft Office accounts.
